projects.title: Taking Down Endpoint (Competitive Playbook)
projects.estivanRole: Strategy, Website & 3rd Party (his area within the group)
projects.summary: 20+ page competitive playbook analyzing Almac, 4G Clinical, and other competitors to Endpoint Clinical. Includes SWOT analysis, positioning strategy, SEO/SEM/LLM optimization recommendations, marketing automation workflows, and analytics framework.
keyInsights: Competitor positioning gaps identified
SEO and LLM optimization strategy
Marketing automation and email nurture flows
Data science and analytics integration
projects.whatItProves: Strategic thinking, competitive analysis, ability to synthesize complex market data into actionable positioning

projects.title: Endpoint LinkedIn Campaign
projects.summary: Phase 2A and 2B retargeting strategy for Endpoint Clinical's LinkedIn presence. Phase 2A focused on generating qualified leads through carousel retargeting. Phase 2B drove deeper interest through video retargeting with CTA.
keyInsights: Phase-based campaign architecture
Retargeting from awareness to conversion
KPI targets per phase: CTR, engagement rate, conversions, ROAS
Kill/scale rules for budget optimization
Two experiment hypotheses for audience and creative testing
projects.whatItProves: Campaign planning discipline, metrics-driven marketing, structured phased execution

projects.title: Franklin Templeton x Mashable ME Partnership
projects.summary: Campaign concept targeting women investors in the UAE through a Franklin Templeton x Mashable ME partnership. Estivan built the Arabic version of the deck, reviewed by his family for accuracy.
keyInsights: Women make up ~8% of ETF investors in UAE, growing 18% in 5 years
Community-driven engagement strategy
Dual-language content (English + Arabic)
Social media pivot for traditionally non-social brand
projects.whatItProves: Multilingual content creation, cultural sensitivity, market research, ability to build bilingual campaigns

projects.title: L'Oréal Cell BioPrint MAPS Campaign
projects.summary: Campaign deck mapping three personas (Margaret the consumer, Madison the medspa, Ida the influencer) across the marketing funnel with touchpoints by stage: ads, landing pages, website triggers, email, and retention.
keyInsights: Three distinct persona profiles with pain points and triggers
Touchpoints by funnel stage for each persona
One funnel across all three personas with tactics adjusted by audience
Positioning and target market segmentation
projects.whatItProves: Persona-driven marketing, funnel architecture, touchpoint mapping, audience segmentation

projects.title: Isa Grimes Interview
projects.summary: A real conversation with Isa Grimes (CMO at Endpoint Clinical, SDSU professor) about your 20s, people skills, leadership, favoritism, support systems, and why the fastest route is not always the right one.
keyInsights: People judgment and perspective matter more than titles
Leadership is about reading situations and adapting
The value of mentorship and support systems
Patience and long-term thinking over quick wins
projects.whatItProves: Ability to conduct meaningful interviews, people skills, editorial thinking, relationship building

projects.title: Endpoint Elosity Video Concept
projects.summary: Solo video concept for Endpoint's Elosity platform. Made with no prior video production experience using Google Gemini Veo 3.0, CapCut Pro, and audio tools. Never run as a paid ad.
projects.whatItProves: Willingness to learn new tools, creative problem-solving, self-directed project execution

projects.title: This Website (Portfolio)
projects.summary: Started in late November 2025 with no coding background. Over 300 hours of directing, reviewing, and shipping. AI wrote every line of code (Claude, Copilot, Gemini). Estivan designed, reviewed, and shipped. No templates, no page builders.
projects.features: PWA, service workers, Lighthouse 90+, AI chatbot (Savonie), coverflow carousel with roulette, dark/light theme, multi-language support, editorial design system
projects.whatItProves: Initiative, follow-through, quality standards, ability to direct complex technical work without being a coder
